Defines built-in resources, file resource data, and timeline resource IDs for the Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[builtin_resources.auto.c](builtin_resources.auto.c.md)**: Defines built-in resources with their IDs and byte data for the Pebble firmware.
- **[pfs_resource_table.c](pfs_resource_table.c.md)**: Defines file resource data and stores for the Pebble firmware, including resource IDs and names.
- **[timeline_resource_table.auto.c](timeline_resource_table.auto.c.md)**: Defines a table of timeline resource IDs for various notification and event types in different sizes.
